name: Atika bint Muslim
title: Trampled Blossom
shortDescription: Muslim ibn Aqeel's seven-year-old daughter who was martyred by being trampled under horses' hooves during the brutal attack on the tents on Ashura.
fullStory:
Atika bint Muslim ibn Aqeel was another young daughter of Imam Hussain's (AS) devoted ambassador. She was only seven years old during the event of Ashura.

After her father's martyrdom in Kufa, Atika was present in Imam Hussain's (AS) caravan with her mother (Ruqayya bint Ali), carrying a heart full of sorrow. On the day of Ashura, she witnessed the martyrdom of all the men and youth of Bani Hashem.

When Imam Hussain (AS) was martyred, the ruthless armies of Kufa and Sham rushed to loot the tents of the Ahl al-Bayt. Women and children, in great terror, fled from the tents into the desert.

In this brutal attack, Atika, being a small and weak girl, fell under the hooves of the enemy army's horses amidst the chaos and looting, and her small body was crushed. She was unjustly martyred and her pure soul joined her father Muslim.
quoteArabic: يا بَني هاشِمٍ! نامُوا لا نَوْمَ لَكُمْ...
quote: (Condition in her mourning:) O Bani Hashem! How can you sleep while your children were crushed under horses' hooves?
